extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Agent Builder escalation configuration view for an autonomous agent. On the left, the agent flow canvas displays a selected escalation node named "Triage Escalation" connected to the "ServiceNow Incidents M..." agent and its related tools/context nodes. On the right, the properties panel is open with the escalation configured as an App Task using the "ServiceNow Escalation App," including a description prompt, task title, and priority.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Select the "Triage Escalation" node in the Flow canvas.
2. In the "Escalation Name" field, enter "Triage Escalation".
3. In the "Description" field, enter "Use this when you can not establish category and subcategory of the Incident based on Description and Short Description".
4. In the "Escalation Type" dropdown, select "App Task".
5. In the "Action App" field, select "ServiceNow Escalation App".
6. Expand "Additional Properties" if needed.
7. In the "Task title" field, enter "Categorization request".
8. In the "Priority" dropdown, leave or select "Medium".
